description: The Verdant Negroni layers Gin, Triple Sec, Espresso, and Strawberry Puree into a glass that tells a story from aroma to lingering finish.
instructions: Chill a rocks glass. Combine Gin, Triple Sec, Espresso, Strawberry Puree in a mixing glass. Stir over cracked ice for half a minute. Fine strain into the chilled glass over fresh ice. Garnish with a citrus twist.
taste: herbal backbone, gentle coffee aroma, subtle vanilla sweetness.

description: The Sunset Spritz layers Blue Curaçao, Honey Syrup, Club Soda, and Lime Juice into a glass that tells a story from aroma to lingering finish.
instructions: Chill a coupe. Combine Blue Curaçao, Honey Syrup, Club Soda, Lime Juice in a shaker. Shake hard for 15 seconds. Fine strain into the chilled glass over no ice. Garnish with roasted rosemary sprig.
taste: zesty citrus sparkle, smoky undertone, lingering bitter finish.

description: The Scarlet Fizz layers Gin, Honey Syrup, Espresso, Lime Juice, Lemon Juice, and Strawberry Puree into a glass that tells a story from aroma to lingering finish.
instructions: Chill a highball. Combine Gin, Honey Syrup, Espresso, Lime Juice, Lemon Juice, Strawberry Puree in a mixing glass. Stir over cracked ice for half a minute. Fine strain into the chilled glass over fresh ice. Garnish with roasted rosemary sprig.
taste: gentle coffee aroma, herbal backbone, zesty citrus sparkle.

description: The Arctic Fizz layers Dark Rum, Amaretto, Chartreuse, Coconut Water, and Lemon Juice into a glass that tells a story from aroma to lingering finish.
instructions: Chill a rocks glass. Combine Dark Rum, Amaretto, Chartreuse, Coconut Water, Lemon Juice in a mixing glass. Shake hard for 15 seconds. Fine strain into the chilled glass over no ice. Garnish with dehydrated fruit wheel.
taste: subtle vanilla sweetness, silky mouthfeel, lingering bitter finish.
